name: Book Divergence Long-Horizon Reversion Test
hypothesis: The BBO vs deep-book divergence concept (`obi_1` vs `obi_ex_bbo`) has failed conclusively at short horizons. Feedback noted a slight WR improvement at much longer horizons. This spec tests the final hypothesis that this signal might predict a very slow mean-reversion effect over a 200-tick (20-second) window, flipping the direction to bet *against* the divergence.
mutation_note: Changed horizon from 10 to 200 ticks and inverted direction to `long_if_neg` to test for a long-term mean-reversion effect as a final exploration.
